This definition emphasizes three key elements: (1) command of coercive means, (2) successful claims to priority over other coercion-wielders, and (3) territorial boundedness.

The more elaborated concept of the national state adds additional criteria: “relatively centralized, differentiated, and autonomous organizations successfully claiming priority in the use of force within large, contiguous, and clearly bounded territories”. This definition distinguishes national states from other forms such as city-states (which controlled small territories), empires (which often had discontinuous territories and indirect rule), and federations (which lacked centralization). Importantly, Tilly notes that the national state form only became dominant quite late in European history, “not until the nineteenth century, with Napoleon’s /nəˈpoʊliən/ conquests and the subsequent unifications of Germany and Italy.

State building, in Tilly’s framework, is measured and understood through several interrelated processes: (1) The disarmament of civilian populations, including the elimination of private armies, prohibition of duels, controls over weapons production, and restrictions on fortified castles; (2) The creation of standing armed forces, armies oriented toward external enemies and police forces oriented toward internal control; (3) The development of fiscal infrastructure, including treasuries, tax bureaus, mechanisms for conscription, and supply services; (4) The establishment of credit systems, the ability to borrow against future revenues and manage national debt; (5) The ratio of coercive means in state hands to those at the disposal of domestic rivals, which increased dramatically as states expanded their armed forces while disarming civilians.

Tilly distinguishes between different organizational forms: armies versus police, with the organizational division between forces oriented to external enemies and those oriented to internal population control developing “only slowly, and never became complete”. The creation of “uniformed, salaried, bureaucratic police forces specialized in control of the civilian population” occurred mainly during the nineteenth century.
zh: 在最基本的层面上，他将国家定义为“任何掌握大量强制手段，并在至少一个边界清晰的领土内成功主张对所有其他强制力使用者持有持久优先权的组织”（第44页）。这一定义强调三个关键要素：（1）掌握强制手段，（2）成功主张对其他强制力行使者的优先权，（3）领土的有界性。

对民族国家更详尽的概念增加了额外标准：“相对集中化、分化和自主的组织，在广阔、连续且边界清晰的领土内成功主张使用武力的优先权”（第43页）。这一定义将民族国家与其他形式区分开来，如城市国家（控制小片领土）、帝国（通常拥有不连续的领土和间接统治）和联邦（缺乏集中化）。重要的是，蒂利指出民族国家形式直到欧洲历史相当晚期才占据主导地位,“直到十九世纪，随着拿破仑的征服以及随后德国和意大利的统一”（第46页）。

Tilly draws explicitly on Max Weber’s classic definition: “a state is a human community that (successfully) claims the monopoly of the legitimate use of physical force within a given territory” This definition only “finally began to make sense for European states” after the seventeenth century, when rulers had successfully disarmed civilian populations and concentrated coercive means in state hands.蒂利对国家的概念化明确借鉴了马克斯·韦伯的经典定义：“国家是一个人类共同体，
它（成功地）在特定领土范围内主张对合法使用物理暴力的垄断权”（第70页）。这一定义只是在十七世纪之后才“终于开始对欧洲国家有意义”，那时统治者已成功解除了平民的武装，并将强制手段集中于国家手中。

在蒂利的框架中，国家建设通过若干相互关联的过程来衡量和理解：（1）平民人口的解除武装——包括消灭私人军队、禁止决斗、控制武器生产、限制设防城堡等（第69页）；（2）常备武装力量的创建——面向外部敌人的军队和面向内部控制的警察力量（第75-76页）；（3）财政基础设施的发展——包括国库、税务机构、征兵机制和补给服务（第70页）；（4）信贷体系的建立——以未来收入为担保进行借贷和管理国债的能力（第85-90页）；（5）国家掌握的强制手段与国内对手掌握的强制手段之比——随着国家扩充武装力量同时解除平民武装，这一比率急剧上升（第70页）。
蒂利区分了不同的组织形式：军队与警察，面向外部敌人的力量与面向内部人口控制的力量之间的组织分化“发展缓慢，且从未完全实现”（第75页）。“专门控制平民人口的制服化、薪金化、官僚化警察力量”的创建主要发生在十九世纪（第76页）。

en: War made states, and vice versa. The creation of armed force generated durable state structure. Different combinations of coercion and capital led to different paths of state formation. The transition from mercenary to national armies during the eighteenth and nineteenth centuries fundamentally altered state-society relations.
(1) The relative availability of concentrated capital and concentrated means of coercion in different regions and periods significantly affected the organizational consequences of making war.

(2) Only those states survived that held their own in war with other states. States unable to mobilize sufficient military resources were conquered, absorbed, or marginalized. This Darwinian selection process gradually eliminated less effective organizational forms.

(3) Over the long run the changing character of war gave the military advantage to states that could draw large, durable military forces from their own populations, which were increasingly national states. The evolution of military technology and tactics, from cavalry-based warfare to infantry with firearms to mass conscript armies, progressively favored states with large populations, substantial tax bases, and bureaucratic capacity to mobilize resources efficiently. This explains the ultimate convergence on the national state form despite the wide variety of earlier state types.

(1) The military competition spiral. European rulers faced a security dilemma in which building coercive capacity provoked neighbors to do the same. “Coercion is always relative; anyone who controls concentrated means of coercion runs the risk of losing advantages when a neighbor builds up his means”. Before 1400, kinship-based rule compounded this competition, as expanding kin groups sought places for growing numbers of heirs, inciting conquest. The fragmented sovereignty of Europe meant that “rivals—whether kinsmen or not—were always close at hand, but so was a coalition nearly always available to keep any particular center from expanding indefinitely”.

(2) The extraction-coercion cycle. Rulers needed resources to wage war, but extracting those resources required coercive capacity. “Over and over, rulers sent troops to enforce the collection of tribute, taxes, and levies of men or materials”. This created a self-reinforcing cycle: coercion enabled extraction, extraction funded more coercion. Rulers “resembled racketeers: at a price, they offered protection against evils that they themselves would otherwise inflict, or at least allow to be inflicted”.

(3) The capital-credit-warfare conjunction. The ability to borrow was crucial because military expenditures came in surges while revenues fluctuated less dramatically. “A state that borrows quickly, furthermore, can mobilize faster than its enemies, and thus increase its chances of winning a war” .

(4) Monetization and state capacity. The degree of commercialization in an economy affected how efficiently states could tax. In highly monetized economies, “the taxes toward the upper end of the continuum are relatively efficient. They build on the measurement and visibility a commercial economy applies to property, goods, and services”. Consequently, “If two states of similar size but different degrees of commercialization go to war and attempt to extract comparable sums of money from their citizens by means of the same sorts of taxes, the less commercialized state creates a bulkier state structure as it wars and pays for war”.

(5) Military technology and scale. Changes in military technology drove changes in state structure. Around 1500, “the invention and diffusion of firearms had tipped the military advantage toward monarchs who could afford to cast cannon and build the new kinds of fortresses that cannon could not easily shatter”. The development of mobile siege artillery, trained infantry, and naval vessels carrying big guns “multiplied the scale and destructiveness of warfare. This technological escalation created pressures that only larger, wealthier states could withstand.

(6) War produced permanent expansions of state capacity. “A major war effort generally produced a permanent expansion of the state’s central apparatus—the number of its full-time personnel, the scope of its institutions, the size of its budget, the extent of its debt”. This occurred because wartime increases gave officials new capacity to extract resources and defend against cost-cutting, wars revealed new problems requiring state attention, and accumulated debt placed new burdens on the state.
zh: 欧洲统治者面临安全困境：建设强制能力会刺激邻国采取同样行动。“强制总是相对的；任何控制集中强制手段的人，当邻国加强其手段时，都面临丧失优势的风险”（第71页）。1400年之前，以亲属关系为基础的统治加剧了这种竞争，扩张的亲属群体为日益增多的继承人寻找位置，刺激了征服（第71页）。欧洲碎片化的主权意味着“无论是否为亲属，对手总是近在咫尺，但几乎总有一个联盟可以阻止任何特定中心无限扩张”（第71页）。
统治者需要资源来发动战争，但榨取这些资源需要强制能力。“统治者一再派遣军队强制征收贡赋、税收以及人员或物资的摊派”（第75页）。这创造了一个自我强化的循环：强制使榨取成为可能，榨取为更多强制提供资金。统治者“类似于敲诈者：以一定代价，他们提供保护，使人们免受他们自己本会施加或至少会允许施加的祸害”（第75页）。
借贷能力至关重要，因为军事支出激增而收入波动较小。“此外，能够快速借贷的国家可以比敌人更快动员，从而增加赢得战争的机会”（第85页）。这创造了一种三角关系：“流入这一中央权威的财政资源维持着它对军事力量的垄断，而这反过来又维持着对税收的垄断”（第85页，引自诺贝特·埃利亚斯 /ˈnɔːrbərt ˈeɪliəs/）。信贷将军事垄断与税收垄断联系起来。
经济的商业化程度影响国家征税的效率。在高度货币化的经济中，“处于连续体上端的税种相对高效。它们建立在商业经济对财产、商品和服务的计量和可见性之上”（第89页）。因此，“如果两个规模相近但商业化程度不同的国家开战，并试图通过同类税种从公民那里榨取相当数额的资金，商业化程度较低的国家会在战争和支付战争费用的过程中建立更庞大的国家结构”（第89页）。
军事技术的变化推动了国家结构的变化。约1500年前后，“火器的发明和传播使军事优势倾向于那些有能力铸造大炮和建造大炮难以摧毁的新型堡垒的君主”（第76页）。移动式攻城炮、训练有素的步兵和装载大炮的帆船的发展“倍增了战争的规模和破坏性”（第77页）。这种技术升级产生的压力只有更大、更富有的国家才能承受。
战争产生了国家能力的永久性扩张。“一场重大战争努力通常会永久性地扩大国家的中央机构——其全职人员数量、其机构范围、其预算规模、其债务程度”（第89页）。这是因为战时增长赋予官员榨取资源和抵制削减开支的新能力，战争揭示或造成了需要国家关注的新问题，而债务积累给国家带来了新负担。

en: Five maps adapted from Colin McEvedy’s /kɒlɪn məkˈiːvdi/ Penguin Atlas series.
Detailed historical accounts of specific states and regions.
Jack Levy’s /dʒæk ˈlɛvi/ compilation based on Pitirim Sorokin’s /pɪˈtɪrɪm sɔːˈroʊkɪn/ work.

(1) Process Tracing: Tilly traces causal chains linking war, extraction, and state-building over time. He shows how specific events (the French invasion of Italy in 1494, the introduction of gunpowder) triggered sequences of institutional change.

(2) Comparative Case Analysis: The chapter compares different types of states: capital-intensive (Dutch Republic, Venice), coercion-intensive (Russia, Spain), and capitalized-coercion (France, Britain, Prussia), to demonstrate how initial conditions shaped subsequent development.
(3) Ideal-Type Construction: Following Weber, Tilly constructs ideal types of state formation paths and taxation strategies to organize historical complexity.
Assumptions:
(1) The European states examined are representative of broader patterns, or at least that the mechanisms identified operated similarly across cases.

(2) Causal direction is that war drove state formation rather than the reverse (or rather, that both directions operated but the war-to-state direction was primary). This could be challenged if states with strong pre-existing structures were simply more likely to wage war.
(3) The analysis assumes meaningful comparison across centuries despite massive changes in technology, economy, and culture.
(4) Historical data on army sizes, war deaths, and fiscal figures are reliable. But actually they are notoriously unreliable, especially before the nineteenth century. Tilly acknowledges this.
(5) The analysis implicitly assumes that without war, states would not have developed as they did, but this is a counterfactual that cannot be directly tested.
(1) Openning the War-Making-State theory.
(2) Rejecting static or teleological conceptions of the state.
(3) Showing that Weber’s definition of the state as a monopolist of legitimate violence only became applicable in Europe after the seventeenth century.

(1) Tilly’s framework was developed primarily to explain European state formation and may not travel well to other regions. Other scholars have shown that the “war makes states” dynamic did not operate similarly in Latin America, where wars were less frequent and less state-building in their effects. Future research could systematically test the mechanisms in non-European contexts and identify scope conditions for the theory.

(2) While Tilly notes that extraction provoked resistance, he does not systematically analyze how popular resistance shaped state formation. Greater attention could be given to the bargaining between rulers and ruled, and to how resistance shaped the institutions of extraction and representation.

(1) Gender. Tilly’s analysis is largely gender-blind. How did the gendered division of labor in warfare and taxation affect state development? How did conscription reshape gender relations? How did the exclusion of women from military service affect their citizenship status?

(2)Civil War. Tilly focused primarily on interstate war. How does civil war affect state formation? Contemporary states face more internal than external threats. Does civil war build state capacity, destroy it, or reshape it in distinctive ways?

(3) Since 1945, interstate war has become rare while state formation continues. What has replaced war as a driver of state-building? Possible answers include international assistance, competition for foreign direct investment, and transnational institutions.

(4) Can states build fiscal capacity without war? The experience of developmental states in East Asia suggests alternative paths to state-building through industrial policy and economic planning. What are the conditions under which non-military factors drive administrative development?

zh: 《领土国家的经济起源》/ “The Economic Origins of the Territorial State”
斯科特·F·艾布拉姆森

en: 2017, published in International Organization, Volume 71, Winter issue, pp. 97-130.
zh: 2017年，发表于《国际组织》(International Organization) 期刊第71卷冬季刊，页码97-130。

en: The main dependent variable in this paper is the number and size (geographic area) of European states. Specifically, the author focuses on the degree of political fragmentation—that is, how many independent states exist within a given geographic area and how their average geographic scale changes over time (p. 97). In the empirical analysis, the author employs two specific measurements: first, the geographic area of states (measured in square kilometers); second, the number of states formed within fixed geographic units (10,000 square-kilometer grid squares) (p. 117).
zh: 本文的主要因变量是欧洲国家的数量与规模（地理面积）。具体而言，作者关注的是政治权威的碎片化程度——即在某一特定地理区域内存在多少独立国家，以及这些国家的平均地理规模如何随时间变化（第97页）。在实证分析中，作者采用两种具体测量方式：一是国家的地理面积（以平方公里计），二是在固定地理单元（10,000平方公里的网格方块）内形成的国家数量（第117页）。

en: The main independent variable is urban population size, serving as a proxy for urban growth and commercial revival. The author uses the dataset compiled by Bairoch /beɪˈrɒk/, Batou /bæˈtuː/, and Chevre /ˈʃevrə/, which covers approximately 2,200 towns that had populations of 5,000 or more at some point between 800 and 1800 CE (p. 117). Urban population is treated as a measure of economic development, commercial activity, and the strength of emerging burgher classes.
zh: 本文的主要自变量是城市人口规模，作为城市增长与商业复兴的代理指标。作者使用贝洛赫(Bairoch /beɪˈrɒk/)、巴图(Batou /bæˈtuː/)和谢弗(Chevre /ˈʃevrə/)编纂的数据集，该数据集涵盖了公元800年至1800年间约2,200个曾拥有5,000人以上人口的城镇（第117页）。城市人口被视为经济发展、商业活动以及新兴市民阶层力量的衡量标准。

en: The author adopts a minimalist Weberian /ˈveɪbəriən/ definition of the state. He defines states as “organizations that maintain a quasi-monopoly of violence over a fixed territory”—that is, organizations that have a clear preponderance of coercive means over some geographically defined unit (pp. 100-101). This definition closely matches Tilly’s /ˈtɪli/ formulation on the first page of Coercion, Capital, and European States: states are “coercion-wielding organizations that are distinct from households and kinship groups and exercise clear priority in some respects over all other organizations within substantial territories” (p. 101).

The author explicitly rejects the requirement of juridical sovereignty as a central feature of statehood. Drawing on Krasner /ˈkræznər/ and Osiander /oʊˈziːændər/, he notes that the conventional view treating the Peace of Westphalia /west ˈfeɪliə/ of 1648 as a historical turning point is mistaken—the contemporary legal understanding of sovereignty did not develop until well into the nineteenth century (pp. 101-102). Political entities like France /fræns/, Venice /ˈvenɪs/, and England /ˈɪŋɡlənd/, as well as older polities like the Roman Empire or the Han Empire, existed as coercion-monopolizing entities long before 1648 or 1555 (p. 104).
To operationalize this definition, the author provides three observable coding criteria to distinguish states from non-states (pp. 102-103):

First, Direct Military Occupation: If a political unit is militarily occupied by a foreign power, it ceases to exist as an independent state according to the coding scheme. For example, when the Castilian-Aragonese /kæˈstiːliən ærəˈɡɒniːz/ state drove the Moors /mʊərz/ from Granada /ɡrəˈnɑːdə/, the Emirate of Granada ceases to be coded as an independent state and its territory is coded as part of Castile /kæˈstiːl/ (p. 103).

Second, The Capacity to Tax: Expropriative power—the ability to take from another what she owns—is the coercive authority most associated with statehood. Taxation is simply on-the-path coercion. The author takes the capacity to tax as evidence of the state’s quasi-monopoly of coercion. For example, when Worms /vɔːrmz/ (1184) or Lübeck /ˈlyːbek/ (1226) demonstrably gained rights to collect taxes and tolls within their boundaries, they are coded as independent states (p. 103).

Third, A Common Executive: Recognizing that many states during this period were “composite” entities composed of political units that maintained semi-independent bureaucracies, parliaments, and other separate political institutions, the author treats those sharing a common executive as a single state. For example, all territory held by the head of the Wittelsbach /ˈvɪtəlzbɑːk/ family—at various points including the Counties of Holland /ˈhɒlənd/, Hainaut /eɪˈnoʊ/, and Zeeland /ˈziːlənd/, as well as the Duchies of Jülich /ˈjuːlɪç/ and Berg /bɛrk/—are all coded as a single state. However, when the family split territory among its various component branches, each is treated as a distinct state (p. 103).

This coding scheme allows the author to treat many constituent units within the Holy Roman Empire—such as imperial city-states, prince-bishoprics, free cities, and imperial abbeys—as independent states when they demonstrated effective independence. As Bryce /braɪs/ describes, by the end of the thirteenth century an increasing number of units within the Empire acquired de facto independence; even petty magnates “swore fealty to only God and Emperor” yet “eschewed themselves equally of both powers” and maintained “full jurisdiction... rights of legislation, privileges of coining money, levying tolls and taxes” (p. 105).

Regarding leagues of city-states (such as the Hansa /ˈhænsə/ or Swabian /ˈsweɪbiən/ League), the author argues they were not a fundamentally distinct alternative to the state but rather organizations made up of units he calls states. Leagues facilitated cooperation among members largely through reputational mechanisms; they could not directly tax their members and relied upon voluntary compliance of individual member cities for revenue. Like modern international organizations, the Hansa could at most expel member cities who failed to comply with calls for revenue (p. 105). The absence of third-party enforcement is most evident in military affairs: for example, when the Hansa waged war against the Danish Crown in 1360, it could not compel all member states to participate in the conflict (p. 105).
zh: 作者采用了一种简约的韦伯式(Weber /ˈveɪbər/)国家定义。他将国家界定为“在固定领土上维持暴力准垄断的组织”——即在某一地理界定的单元上拥有明确强制手段优势的组织（第100-101页）。这一定义与蒂利(Tilly /ˈtɪli/)在《强制、资本与欧洲国家》一书开篇的表述高度吻合：国家是“运用强制的组织，有别于家户和亲属群体，在某些方面对其实质性领土内的所有其他组织行使明确优先权”（第101页）。

作者明确放弃了法理主权(juridical sovereignty)作为国家地位的核心特征这一要求。他援引克拉斯纳(Krasner /ˈkræznər/)和奥西安德(Osiander /oʊˈziːændər/)的研究指出，将1648年《威斯特伐利亚和约》(Peace of Westphalia /west ˈfeɪliə/)视为历史转折点的传统观点是错误的——当代法律意义上的主权概念直到19世纪才得以充分发展（第101-102页）。在1648年或1555年之前，诸如法国、威尼斯(Venice /ˈvenɪs/)、英格兰(England /ˈɪŋɡlənd/)这样的政治实体，乃至更古老的罗马帝国(Roman Empire)或汉帝国(Han Empire)，早已作为垄断强制手段的实体而存在（第104页）。
为使这一定义可操作化，作者提出三项可观察的编码标准来区分国家与非国家（第102-103页）：
第一，直接军事占领： 若某一政治单元被外国势力军事占领，按照本文编码规则，该单元即不再作为独立国家存在。例如，当卡斯提尔-阿拉贡(Castile-Aragon /kæˈstiːl əˈræɡɒn/)国家将摩尔人逐出格拉纳达(Granada /ɡrəˈnɑːdə/)时，格拉纳达酋长国不再被编码为独立国家，其领土被编码为卡斯提尔的一部分（第103页）。
第二，征税能力： 征敛权力——即从他人手中夺取其所有物的能力——是与国家地位最密切相关的强制性权威。征税本质上是一种“在均衡路径上”的强制行为。作者以征税能力作为国家对强制手段准垄断的证据。例如，当沃尔姆斯(Worms /vɔːrmz/)于1184年、吕贝克(Lübeck /ˈlyːbek/)于1226年明确获得在其边界内征收税款和通行费的权利时，它们便被编码为独立国家（第103页）。

第三，共同行政长官： 鉴于这一时期许多国家是由维持半独立官僚机构、议会和其他独立政治制度的政治单元组成的“复合”实体，作者将拥有共同行政长官的单元视为单一国家。例如，维特尔斯巴赫(Wittelsbach /ˈvɪtəlzbɑːk/)家族首领所持有的所有领土——在不同时期包括荷兰(Holland /ˈhɒlənd/)、埃诺(Hainaut /eɪˈnoʊ/)和泽兰(Zeeland /ˈziːlənd/)伯国，以及于利希(Jülich /ˈjuːlɪç/)和贝格(Berg /bɛrk/)公国——都被编码为单一国家。然而，当家族在各分支之间分割领土时，每个分支则被视为独立国家（第103页）。

这种编码方式使作者能够将神圣罗马帝国(Holy Roman Empire)内部的许多组成单元——如帝国直辖城市、采邑主教区、自由城市和帝国修道院——在它们展示出有效独立性时编码为独立国家。正如布莱斯(Bryce /braɪs/)所描述的，到13世纪末，帝国内越来越多的单元获得了事实上的独立；即便是小贵族也“只向上帝和皇帝宣誓效忠，却同时摆脱了这两种权力”，并维持“完全的司法管辖权……立法权、铸币特权、征收通行费和税款的权利”（第105页）。

关于城市联盟（如汉萨同盟/Hansa /ˈhænsə/或施瓦本联盟/Swabian League /ˈsweɪbiən/），作者认为它们并非国家的根本性替代形式，而是由他所定义的国家组成的组织。联盟主要通过声誉机制促进成员间合作，它们无法直接对成员征税，只能依靠成员城市的自愿遵守来获取收入。与现代国际组织类似，汉萨同盟至多只能将不遵守收入要求的成员城市开除（第105页）。在军事事务中，第三方执行机制的缺失尤为明显：例如，当汉萨同盟于1360年与丹麦王室开战时，它无法强制所有成员国参战（第105页）。

en: The core argument of this paper is that observed changes in the number and size of states before the French Revolution were driven by economic factors rather than changes in patterns of war and war making. In those regions where urban life reclaimed a foothold, where new cities formed and the new social classes that emerged within them were capable of asserting themselves, political life fragmented. These new political actors, by virtue of their material wealth, were capable of resisting the centralizing efforts of the leaders of would-be territorial states. In the continent’s periphery, where these groups were weak and incapable of subverting the construction of large states, the earliest national states formed (p. 125).

The author explicitly challenges the long-standing belief that changes in patterns of war and war making caused the emergence of large territorial states. This mainstream view dates back to German sociologists Hintze /ˈhɪntsə/ and Weber /ˈveɪbər/ and was further developed by scholars such as Tilly /ˈtɪli/, Downing /ˈdaʊnɪŋ/, and Ertman /ˈɜːrtmən/. According to these “bellicist” theories, large states could most easily raise the manpower and finance required to field increasingly large standing armies and increasingly expensive technologies of coercion necessary to survive an era of endemic warfare. Technological shocks to the production of violence selected states most capable of adapting to these changes, and the most fit states were allegedly those that maintained advantages in the form of substantial populations, larger tax bases, and greater access to natural resources—that is, geographically large states (p. 98).

However, the author argues that before the French Revolution, before the era of the mass-conscript army, wealth could purchase not only the technologies of violence but also the manpower required to prosecute major wars. Rather than being an age when large states dominated militarily, this was a period when the population and natural resource advantages of territorial states provided little benefit in the production of violence. Just as city-states could use economic resources to purchase the most advanced technologies of coercion like siege artillery or firearms, leaders of states could, for a negotiated price, hire a Hessian /ˈhesiən/ colonel or an Italian condottiero /ˌkɒndɒˈtjɛroʊ/ and retain their men for a campaign season. It was by virtue of their economic capacity that city-states like Genoa /ˈdʒenəwə/ and Florence /ˈflɒrəns/, or groups of independent towns like the Swabian League, could raise armies that matched or even exceeded those of territorial states like France or England (pp. 98-99).

The author further points out that if the economic capacity of states best explains their ability to project force, it is not clear that large territorial states held an advantage over their smaller competitors. In fact, the opposite is likely true. For example, the tax income of the Della Scala /ˌdelə ˈskɑːlə/ signoria in the fourteenth century was double that of England; the revenue of Venice /ˈvenɪs/ in the fifteenth century was 60 percent greater than that of France and more than double Spain’s /speɪnz/ or England’s. Moreover, geographically small and urban city-states could far more easily and earlier construct financial instruments necessary to purchase the means of defense required to survive interstate competition (p. 99).
zh: 本文的核心论点是：在法国大革命之前，欧洲国家数量和规模的观察变化是由经济因素而非战争方式变化所驱动的。在城市生活重新立足的地区，在新城市形成且其中涌现的新社会阶层能够自我主张的地方，政治生活走向碎片化。这些新的政治行动者凭借其物质财富，能够抵抗意图构建领土国家的领导者的中央集权努力。而在欧洲大陆边缘地区，这些群体力量薄弱、无力阻止大国建设，最早的民族国家便在那里形成（第125页）。

作者明确挑战了长期以来的主流观点——即战争模式和战争方式的变化导致了大型领土国家的出现。这一主流观点可追溯至德国社会学家辛策(Hintze /ˈhɪntsə/)和韦伯(Weber /ˈveɪbər/)，并由蒂利(Tilly /ˈtɪli/)、唐宁(Downing /ˈdaʊnɪŋ/)、厄特曼(Ertman /ˈɜːrtmən/)等学者进一步发展。根据这些“好战主义”(bellicist)理论，大国最容易筹集到组建日益庞大的常备军和日益昂贵的强制技术所需的人力和财力，以在地方性战争时代生存下来。对暴力生产的技术冲击选择了最能适应这些变化的国家，而最适者据称是那些拥有大量人口、更大税基和更多自然资源的国家——即地理上的大国（第98页）。

然而，作者认为，在法国大革命之前、在大规模征兵军队时代来临之前，财富可以购买暴力技术和发动重大战争所需的人力。这不是一个大国在军事上占主导地位的时代，而是一个领土国家的人口和自然资源优势在暴力生产中几乎没有带来好处的时期。正如城邦可以用经济资源购买最先进的强制技术（如攻城炮或火器）一样，国家领导者可以以谈判好的价格雇佣黑森(Hessian /ˈhesiən/)上校或意大利雇佣兵首领(condottiero /ˌkɒndɒˈtjɛroʊ/)及其部队进行一个战役季节的作战。正是凭借经济能力，热那亚(Genoa /ˈdʒenəwə/)和佛罗伦萨(Florence /ˈflɒrəns/)这样的城邦，或施瓦本联盟(Swabian League)这样的独立城镇群体，才能组建与法国或英格兰等领土国家匹敌甚至超过其规模的军队（第98-99页）。

作者进一步指出，如果经济资源在很大程度上决定了投射武力的能力，那么大型领土国家相对于较小竞争者是否占有优势就不清楚了。事实上，情况可能恰恰相反。例如，德拉·斯卡拉家族(Della Scala /ˌdelə ˈskɑːlə/)领地在14世纪的税收收入是英格兰的两倍；15世纪威尼斯的收入比法国高60%，是西班牙或英格兰的两倍多。此外，地理上较小的城市城邦比大型领土国家更容易、更早地建立购买生存所需防御手段的金融工具（第99页）。

en: The causal mechanism proposed by the author builds on the traditions of political sociologist Rokkan /ˈrɒkən/ and economic historian Pirenne /pɪˈren/, further developed by Spruyt /sprɔɪt/. The mechanism can be summarized as the following causal chain (pp. 99-100, 113-116):

Step One: The revival of Eastern trade and urban life. In the last half of the tenth century, Eastern trade reemerged and urban life revived. This commercial revival was not geographically uniform but concentrated in a central regional band extending roughly in an arc from the Low Countries /ˈloʊ ˈkʌntriz/, through the Rhineland /ˈraɪnlænd/, and into Northern Italy (pp. 99, 116).

Step Two: The formation of new commercial classes. In those places where trade resumed, new towns and cities formed as hubs of economic life, allowing a class of burghers to establish effective independence. These new social groups residing in cities—the only real location of economic specialization in the pre-industrial world—embodied newly acquired material capabilities (pp. 115, 124).

Step Three: Burghers use economic power to assert independence. The wealth that came to exist in these new towns and cities allowed urban social groups, in ways no different from the constructors of territorial states, to project force and assert themselves as independent states within the international system. The wealth that came to exist in new towns and cities allowed urban social groups to project force and assert themselves as independent states (pp. 99-100). For example, Genoa /ˈdʒenəwə/ raised an army of 40,000 men in 1295; in contrast, the French army at the end of the Hundred Years War was estimated to be 14,000 (p. 99, footnote 11).

Step Four: Urban groups prevent territorial consolidation. Where towns formed and burghers could force their rights upon princes and kings, smaller political units proliferated. By virtue of these groups’ economic power, monarchs—particularly the Holy Roman Emperor—were impeded in their attempts to create geographically large states and were forced into political bargains accepting the de facto independence of these states. Moreover, because of their wealth and ability to establish institutions like the Hansa capable of providing quasi-public or club goods like collective security, these states could not merely claim independence but sustain it over time (pp. 115-116).

Step Five: Formation of large territorial states in the periphery. Only in the weakly commercialized European periphery did large territorial states form. In the absence of dense urban and commercial growth—outside the urbanized central corridor—large territorial states took shape (pp. 100, 116).

The author also tests this mechanism in the appendix using proto-industrial (textile and metallurgic) activity as a proxy for the presence of commercial actors. Using the mediation analysis methodology proposed by Imai /iːˈmaɪ/, Keele /kiːl/, and Tingley /ˈtɪŋɡli/, he finds that about 40 percent of the effect of urban population can be explained by the presence of commercial social actors proxied by proto-industrial activity (p. 124).
zh: 作者提出的因果机制建立在政治社会学家罗坎(Rokkan /ˈrɒkən/)和经济史学家皮雷纳(Pirenne /pɪˈren/)的传统之上，并由斯普鲁伊特(Spruyt /sprɔɪt/)进一步发展。该机制可概括为以下因果链条（第99-100页、113-116页）：
第一步：东方贸易的复兴与城市生活的恢复。 十世纪后半叶，东方贸易重新兴起，城市生活复苏。这一商业复兴在地理上并非均匀分布，而是集中在从低地国家(Low Countries)经莱茵兰(Rhineland /ˈraɪnlænd/)延伸至北意大利(Northern Italy)的中央区域带（第99页、116页）。
第二步：新商业阶层的形成。 在贸易恢复的地方，新的城镇和城市作为经济生活的中心而形成，使市民阶层(burghers)得以建立有效的独立地位。这些居住在城市中的新社会群体——在前工业时代唯一真正实现经济专业化的地方——体现了新兴的物质能力（第115页、124页）。
第三步：市民阶层利用经济力量主张独立。 这些城市群体的财富使他们能够以与领土国家建造者无异的方式投射武力，并在国际体系中主张自己作为独立国家的地位。新城镇和城市中的财富使城市社会群体能够投射武力并主张自己的独立国家地位（第99-100页）。例如，热那亚在1295年组建了一支40,000人的军队；相比之下，法国军队在百年战争结束时估计只有14,000人（第99页脚注11）。
第四步：城市群体阻止领土整合。 在城镇形成、市民能够向君主和国王争取权利的地方，较小的政治单元大量涌现。凭借群体的经济力量，君主——尤其是神圣罗马帝国皇帝——在建立地理上大型国家的尝试中受阻，被迫接受承认这些国家事实独立地位的政治交易。此外，由于他们的财富和建立能够提供集体安全等准公共物品或俱乐部物品的制度（如汉萨同盟）的能力，这些国家不仅能够声称独立，而且能够长期维持它（第115-116页）。
第五步：边缘地区大型领土国家的形成。 只有在商业化程度较弱的欧洲边缘地区，大型领土国家才得以形成。在没有密集的城市和商业增长的地方——即在城市化的中央区域带之外——大型领土国家才得以成形（第100页、116页）。
作者还在附录中使用原工业活动（纺织和冶金活动）作为商业行动者存在的代理变量来检验这一机制。通过伊迈(Imai /iːˈmaɪ/)、基尔(Keele /kiːl/)和廷利(Tingley /ˈtɪŋɡli/)提出的中介分析方法，他发现大约40%的城市人口效应可以通过原工业活动所代表的商业社会行动者的存在来解释（第124页）。

en: Data Sources and Construction: The author constructs a new dataset describing the entire universe of European states between 1100 and 1790 by manually geo-referencing several sets of historical maps. Two main sources are the Centennia Historical Atlas (Reed) and the Euratlas (Nussli /ˈnʊsli/) digital atlas. The Nussli data are measured in one-hundred-year panels, whereas the Reed atlas utilizes a more high-frequency approach, recording observations in tenths of years. The author aligns boundaries from both datasets at every hundred-year mark (p. 106).

Supplements and Corrections: Even after combining data from these digital sources, there remain imperfections. For example, units coded as independent states according to the author’s scheme are absent from the reconstructed shape files—these tend to be small independent principalities, ecclesiastical units, and city-states not captured by historical geographers. To rectify these flaws and prevent ensuing selection problems, the author turns to a number of historical and contemporary primary source maps to create high-frequency boundary changes for these missing units (p. 106). The author illustrates this procedure with a detailed example showing the creation of shape files for part of Nassau /ˈnæsɔː/ between 1159 and 1328 (p. 107).

Urban Population Data: Data on urban population come from the widely used dataset of Bairoch, Batou, and Chevre, which describes the population sizes of approximately 2,200 towns that ever had 5,000 or more inhabitants at some time between 800 and 1800 (p. 117).

Instrumental Variable: To address endogeneity concerns, the author uses paleoclimatological sources to construct a measure of random climatic variation in the ability of a given location to produce cereals like wheat. The instrument is the deviation from the optimal growing temperature for cereals (10.5°C) (pp. 119-120).
Geographic Coverage: The entire European continent.
Time Period: 1100 to 1790.

Unit of Analysis: For survival analysis, the unit is individual states; for the analysis of urbanization and state formation, the unit is arbitrarily defined pieces of geography—10,000 square-kilometer grid squares (p. 117).
zh: 数据来源与构建： 作者通过手工地理参照多套历史地图构建了一个新的数据集，描述了1100年至1790年间欧洲国家的完整分布。两个主要来源是森特尼亚历史地图集(Centennia Historical Atlas，里德/Reed编)和欧洲地图集(Euratlas，努斯利/Nussli /ˈnʊsli/编)数字地图集。努斯利数据以百年为面板测量，而里德地图集采用更高频率的方法，以十分之一年为单位记录观察值。作者在每个百年节点对齐两个数据集的边界（第106页）。

补充与修正： 即使在合并这些数字来源的数据后，仍存在一些不完善之处。例如，按作者编码应为独立国家的单元在重建的形状文件中缺失——这些往往是未被历史地理学家捕捉到的小型独立公国、教会单元和城邦。为纠正这些缺陷并防止由此产生的选择性问题，作者转向若干历史和当代原始地图来源，为这些缺失单元创建高频边界变化记录（第106页）。作者通过详细的例子说明了这一程序，展示了1159年至1328年间拿骚(Nassau /ˈnæsɔː/)部分地区形状文件的创建过程（第107页）。
城市人口数据： 关于城市人口的数据来自贝洛赫、巴图和谢弗广泛使用的数据集，该数据集描述了公元800年至1800年间约2,200个曾拥有5,000人以上人口的城镇的人口规模（第117页）。
工具变量： 为解决内生性问题，作者使用古气候来源构建了一个描述特定地点种植谷物（如小麦）能力的随机气候变异指标。该工具变量是距最适宜谷物生长温度（10.5°C）的偏离程度（第119-120页）。
地理覆盖范围： 整个欧洲大陆。
时间跨度： 1100年至1790年。
分析单元： 对于生存分析，分析单元是单个国家；对于城市化与国家形成的关系分析，分析单元是任意定义的地理单元——10,000平方公里的网格方块（第117页）。

en: The author employs multiple methods to assess the argument:

First, Descriptive Statistical Analysis. The author first shows through a simple description of the data that during the period associated with the military revolution, the typical state actually declined in size. He plots the trend in state size across time measured in square kilometers. When considering only the mean, it appears that the bellicist hypothesis matches the general trend—between 1400 and 1790, the average size of states more than doubled from approximately 33,000 to 71,000 square kilometers. However, because the distribution is heavily skewed, with several extremely large states distorting what we might otherwise view as typical, once the data are log-transformed to account for outliers, this upward trend disappears. Rather, the typical state between 1100 and 1790 declined in size (pp. 109-111).

Second, Survival Analysis (Cox Proportional Hazards Model). To test the war-making theories’ prediction that large states should be more likely to survive, the author estimates the relationship between the hazard rate and geographic size of states via a mixed-effects Cox proportional hazards model. He finds that, contrary to bellicist theories, geographically large states are more likely to fail than their smaller counterparts. Moreover, the relationship between size and failure did not change in a statistically significant way across time—the positive relationship between size and the failure rate of states did not change during the period before, after, or during the military revolution (pp. 111-113).

Third, OLS and Negative Binomial Regression. To estimate the relationship between urban population and state formation, the author uses arbitrarily defined pieces of geography (10,000 square-kilometer grid squares) as the unit of analysis and estimates the effect of changes in urban population on the number of states forming within a given unit. Since the number of entrants is by definition a non-negative integer, he estimates via both pooled OLS and negative binomial regression (pp. 117-118).

Fourth, Instrumental Variables Approach (Two-Stage Least Squares). Since the relationship between urban population size and the number of states is likely affected by unobservable confounders and because causality runs in both directions, the author takes an instrumental variables approach to identify the effect of changes in patterns of urban development on the size and number of states. Exploiting random climatic variation in propensity to support large populations—treating deviation from the optimal growing temperature for cereals like wheat as an instrument for the development of towns and cities—he shows that variation in urban growth caused political fragmentation (pp. 100, 119-124).

Assumptions for Method Validity: For the instrumental variables approach, several assumptions must be satisfied to consistently estimate the parameter. First, random assignment is likely satisfied since until the nineteenth century there was little to no human effect on climate. Second, the instrument strength assumption is also satisfied—in each of the first-stage regressions, all tests against weak instrumentation meet conventional levels of statistical significance. Third, the exclusion restriction is also likely satisfied: deviation from the optimal growing temperature for cereals would have to affect the number of states entering on a given quadrant only through urban population (the proxy for economic development), not through other means (pp. 120-122). The author provides evidence supporting the exclusion restriction by controlling for latitude and longitude, including grid-square fixed effects, controlling for per capita income, and conducting sensitivity analysis (pp. 121-123).
zh: 作者采用多种方法来检验其论点：

第一，描述性统计分析。 作者首先通过简单的数据描述表明，在与军事革命相关的时期，典型国家的规模实际上是下降的。他展示了国家规模在时间上的趋势，测量单位为平方公里。当只考虑均值时，看起来好战主义假设与总体趋势吻合——1400年至1790年间，国家的平均规模从约33,000平方公里增加到71,000平方公里。然而，由于分布严重偏斜，存在若干极端大的国家扭曲了典型情况。一旦对数据进行对数转换以解释这些离群值，上升趋势便消失了。相反，1100年至1790年间典型国家的规模下降了（第109-111页）。
第二，生存分析（Cox比例风险模型）。 为检验战争理论关于大国更可能生存的预测，作者采用混合效应Cox比例风险模型估计危险率与国家地理规模之间的关系。他发现，与好战主义理论的结论相反，地理上的大国比小国更容易失败。此外，规模与失败之间的关系在整个时期内没有统计显著性变化——规模与失败率之间的正相关关系在与军事革命相关的时期前后和期间都没有变化（第111-113页）。
第三，OLS和负二项回归。 为估计城市人口与国家形成之间的关系，作者以任意定义的地理单元（10,000平方公里网格方块）为分析单元，估计城市人口变化对给定单元内形成国家数量的影响。由于进入者数量按定义是非负整数，他同时采用合并OLS和负二项回归进行估计（第117-118页）。
第四，工具变量方法（两阶段最小二乘法）。 由于城市人口规模与国家数量之间的关系可能受到不可观测混淆因素的影响，且因果关系是双向的，作者采用工具变量方法来识别城市发展模式变化对国家规模和数量的因果效应。他利用在支持大规模人口方面的随机气候变异——将距谷物（如小麦）最适生长温度的偏离作为城镇和城市发展的工具——表明城市增长的变异导致了政治碎片化（第100页、119-124页）。

方法有效性的假设： 对于工具变量方法，必须满足几个假设才能一致估计参数。首先，随机分配假设可能满足，因为直到19世纪人类对气候几乎没有影响。其次，工具强度假设也满足——在每个第一阶段回归中，所有弱工具性检验都达到传统的统计显著性水平。第三，排除性约束假设也可能满足：距谷物最适生长温度的偏离必须仅通过城市人口（经济发展的代理变量）而非通过其他方式影响给定地区形成的国家数量（第120-122页）。作者通过控制纬度和经度、加入网格方块固定效应、控制人均收入以及进行敏感性分析，提供了支持排除性约束成立的证据（第121-123页）。

en: What would the academia see as the reading’s main contribution?
This paper makes several important contributions to the state formation literature:

First, New Data. The author constructs a novel dataset encompassing the entire universe of European states between 1100 and 1790. This contrasts with previous scholarship that inductively generated theories based on a relatively small subset of “great power” cases (pp. 97, 125). The data enable systematic empirical tests of state formation hypotheses, filling an important gap in the literature—despite extensive scholarship on the topic since Tilly’s 1975 publication of The Formation of National States in Western Europe, there has been little work aimed at explicitly evaluating the hypotheses generated by theories of state formation (p. 97).

Second, Empirical Challenge to Bellicist Theories. The paper provides the first large-scale systematic empirical evidence challenging the dominant bellicist theories of state formation. The author shows that the military revolution—a sequence of dramatic changes to the production of force expected to select large states—did not significantly alter the typical size of states. Contrary to the predictions of bellicist theories, the typical state remained small during the period associated with large-scale changes in the cost of war making (pp. 99, 111).

Third, Counter-intuitive Findings. The study finds that the relationship between geographic scale and survival probability is the opposite of what war-making theories predict: over the entire period studied, small states were more likely to survive than their larger counterparts (pp. 99, 112-113). This challenges the fundamental assumption that scale equals power and highlights the tendency of contemporary scholars to conflate scale with power. Power, manifest in an observed ability to persist—the main objective of states according to international relations theory—was orthogonal to size (p. 125).

Fourth, Credible Causal Identification. By using an instrumental variables approach exploiting random climatic variation in suitability for cereal growth, the author provides a credible estimate of the causal effect of urban development patterns on political fragmentation (pp. 119-124).

Fifth, Theory Refinement. The paper refines the capital and coercion framework and provides systematic evidence for the relative importance of economic theories versus war-making theories. It shows that current scholarship has overemphasized the role of war making and underemphasized the consequences of economic change in explaining the eventual dominance of large territorial states (p. 98).
zh: 本文对国家形成文献做出了几个重要贡献：
第一，新数据。 作者构建了一个全新的数据集，涵盖1100年至1790年间欧洲国家的完整分布。这与以往基于少数“大国”案例进行归纳理论化的研究形成鲜明对比（第97页、125页）。这些数据使得对国家形成假设进行系统的实证检验成为可能，填补了该领域的重要空白——尽管自蒂利1975年出版《西欧民族国家的形成》以来已有近四十年的广泛研究，但几乎没有专门针对国家形成理论所产生假设的明确评估工作（第97页）。
第二，对好战主义理论的实证挑战。 该论文提供了第一个大规模的系统实证证据，对国家形成中占主导地位的好战主义理论提出挑战。作者表明，军事革命——一系列被认为会选择大国的暴力生产的剧烈变化——并没有显著改变典型国家的规模。与这些好战主义理论的预测相反，典型国家在与大规模战争方式变化相关的时期内仍然保持小规模（第99页、111页）。
第三，反直觉发现。 研究发现地理规模与生存概率之间的关系与战争理论预测的相反：在整个研究时期内，小国比大国更可能生存（第99页、112-113页）。这挑战了规模等于权力的基本假设，并凸显了当代学者将规模与权力混为一谈的倾向。在观察到的持续能力——根据国际关系理论，这是国家的主要目标——中所体现的权力，与规模是正交的（第125页）。
第四，可信的因果识别。 通过使用工具变量方法，利用气候对谷物生长适宜性的随机变异，作者提供了城市发展模式对政治碎片化因果效应的可信估计（第119-124页）。
第五，理论精炼。 本文精炼了资本与强制框架，并提供了经济理论相对于战争理论的相对重要性的系统证据。它表明，当前学术界过度强调了战争方式的作用，而低估了经济变化在解释大型领土国家最终主导地位方面的后果（第98页）。

en: What would professional scholars and researchers identify as limitations of the reading and how would they suggest a way to address or improve it?

First, Scope of the State Definition. The author’s minimalist Weberian definition of the state focuses on de facto coercive capacity rather than juridical sovereignty. While this is appropriate for the premodern period, it may not adequately capture the importance of constitutive elements—such as international recognition and legal personhood—that became more important in the early modern period. Future research could develop hybrid coding schemes that incorporate both de facto and de jure dimensions of statehood.

Second, Robustness of Instrumental Variable Assumptions. Although the author provides substantial evidence supporting the exclusion restriction, climate could affect state formation through channels other than urban population—for instance, through effects on disease patterns, adoption of agricultural technologies, or migration. The sensitivity analysis shows results are robust to direct effects up to 36% of the effect size, but stronger evidence might require identifying multiple independent instruments or alternative identification strategies.

Third, Direct Measurement of Mechanisms. Urban population is used as a proxy for the strength of commercial classes, but this measurement is indirect. While the author uses proto-industrial activity as a mediator and finds that 40% of the effect can be explained by it, direct measurement of burgher political organization, their bargaining with monarchs, and their military capabilities would strengthen the causal argument. Future research could systematically code data on urban charters, communal revolts, and urban league formation.

Fourth, Dynamics of Political Coalitions. The paper focuses on the economic foundations of state size and number but pays less attention to the dynamics of how political coalitions form and translate into sustainable political units. A fuller integration with the literature on political coalition formation would be beneficial.

Fifth, Geographic Scope Limited to Europe. The findings are based on European data, which raises questions about whether similar patterns would be observed in other regions—such as China, the Middle East, or South Asia—where urban patterns and state formation trajectories may have followed different causal paths.
zh: 第一，国家定义的适用范围。 作者采用的简约韦伯式国家定义关注事实上的强制能力，而非法理主权。虽然这对前现代时期是适当的，但可能无法充分捕捉构成性要素的重要性——如国际承认和法律人格——后者在近代早期开始变得更加重要。未来研究可以发展混合编码方案，将事实和法理两个维度的国家地位都纳入其中。
第二，工具变量假设的稳健性。 尽管作者提供了大量证据支持排除性约束假设，但气候可能通过城市人口以外的其他渠道影响国家形成——例如，通过影响疾病模式、农业技术采用或人口流动。敏感性分析表明结果对高达36%的效应大小的直接效应具有稳健性，但更强有力的证据可能需要识别多个独立的工具或替代识别策略。
第三，机制的直接测量。 城市人口被用作商业阶层力量的代理变量，但这种测量是间接的。虽然作者使用原工业活动作为中介变量，并发现40%的效应可由此解释，但直接测量市民阶层的政治组织、他们与君主的谈判以及军事能力将加强因果论证。未来研究可以系统编码城市宪章、公社反叛和城市联盟形成的数据。
第四，政治联盟的动态。 本文关注国家规模和数量这一经济基础的后果，但对政治联盟如何形成并转化为可持续政治单元的动态过程关注较少。将经济解释与政治联盟形成文献更全面地整合将是有益的。
第五，地理范围局限于欧洲。 研究发现是基于欧洲数据，这引发了关于其他地区——如中国、中东或南亚——是否观察到类似模式的问题。在这些地区，城市模式和国家形成轨迹可能遵循不同的因果路径。

en: What would professional scholars and researchers propose as a potential extension of the study or a new research question inspired by the paper?

First, Political-Institutional Consequences of Commercial Class Rise. Beyond state size and number, it would be valuable to investigate how the rise of commercial classes affected the development of domestic political institutions—such as representative assemblies, property rights regimes, and fiscal systems. Stasavage’s /ˈstæsəvɪdʒ/ work has begun to explore the link between city-states and representative government; further research could trace how urban power shaped monarch-society bargaining across different polities.

Second, Long-Run Economic Effects. Political fragmentation may have had complex effects on long-term economic development—on one hand fostering innovation and institutional improvements through competition, on the other hindering economies of scale through market fragmentation and increased transaction costs. Abramson and Boix /bɔɪks/ have begun to explore this in a working paper; a comprehensive examination of how political fragmentation affected the origins of the Industrial Revolution would be an important extension.

Third, Comparative Cross-Regional Analysis. Extending the framework beyond Europe to test whether the relationship between urbanization and political fragmentation holds in other historical contexts—such as Warring States China, the Abbasid /əˈbæsɪd/ Middle East, or Mughal /ˈmuːɡəl/ India—would help establish external validity of the findings.

Fourth, The Turning Point Between Military Revolution and Mass Army Era. The author finds that size was not determinative of state survival during the period studied, yet the modern state system consists predominantly of large territorial states. A key extension would be to more precisely identify the turning point at which small states lost their competitive advantage. Onorato /ˌɒnəˈrɑːtoʊ/, Scheve /ʃeɪv/, and Stasavage’s work suggests this may have occurred with the era of mass armies after the French Revolution.

Fifth, Interactions Between War and Economic Development. While the paper treats war and economic development as alternative explanations for state formation, they likely interact with each other. War may stimulate economic development (through fiscal demands and technological innovation), while economic development may affect war-making capacity and frequency. A simultaneous equations approach modeling these interactions could provide a richer picture.

Sixth, Extended Testing of the Westphalian Myth. The paper resonates with Krasner and Osiander’s work on the “Westphalian Myth”—the idea that events surrounding the Thirty Years War did not fundamentally alter the organizing principles of the state system. Deeper historical investigation could examine how state practices and diplomatic norms did (or did not) change following Westphalia.
zh: 第一，商业阶层崛起的政治制度后果。 超越国家规模和数量，研究商业阶层崛起如何影响国内政治制度——如代议制机构、产权制度和财政体系——的发展将是很有价值的。斯塔萨维奇(Stasavage /ˈstæsəvɪdʒ/)的著作已开始探索城邦与代议制政府之间的联系，进一步研究可以追踪城市力量如何影响了不同政体中君主与社会的讨价还价。
第二，长期经济影响。 政治碎片化可能对长期经济发展产生复杂影响——一方面通过竞争促进创新和制度改进，另一方面通过分割市场和增加交易成本阻碍规模经济。艾布拉姆森和博伊斯(Boix /bɔɪks/)在一篇工作论文中已开始探索这一问题；全面检验政治碎片化对工业革命起源的影响将是重要的延伸。
第三，比较跨区域分析。 将框架扩展到欧洲以外，以检验城市化与政治碎片化之间的关系是否在其他历史背景下成立——如战国时期的中国、阿巴斯(Abbasid /əˈbæsɪd/)时期的中东或莫卧儿(Mughal /ˈmuːɡəl/)时期的印度——将有助于确立发现的外部有效性。
第四，军事革命与大众军队时代之间的转折点。 作者发现在所研究的时期内规模并非国家生存的决定因素，但现代国家体系主要由大型领土国家组成。一个关键延伸是更精确地识别小国失去竞争优势的转折点。奥诺拉托(Onorato /ˌɒnəˈrɑːtoʊ/)、谢夫(Scheve /ʃeɪv/)和斯塔萨维奇的研究表明这可能发生在法国大革命之后的大众军队时代。
第五，战争与经济发展之间的互动。 虽然本文将战争和经济发展视为国家形成的替代解释，但它们很可能相互影响。战争可能刺激经济发展（通过财政需求和技术创新），而经济发展可能影响战争能力和频率。建模这些互动的联立方程方法可以提供更丰富的图景。
第六，威斯特伐利亚神话的延伸检验。 本文与克拉斯纳和奥西安德关于“威斯特伐利亚神话”的工作相呼应——即围绕三十年战争的事件并未从根本上改变国家体系的组织原则这一观点。更深入的历史研究可以检验威斯特伐利亚和约之后国家实践和外交规范如何（未）发生变化。
《碎裂土地假说》(“The Fractured-Land Hypothesis”)

en: The authors are Jesús Fernández-Villaverde /heɪˈsuːs fɛrˈnɑːndɛθ ˌviːjɑːˈvɛrdeɪ/ (University of Pennsylvania), Mark Koyama /mɑːrk kɔɪˈjɑːmə/ (George Mason University), Youhong Lin /juːˈhɒŋ lɪn/ (Xiamen University), and Tuan-Hwee Sng /twɑːn hweɪ sŋ/ (National University of Singapore).
zh: 赫苏斯·费尔南德斯-比利亚韦尔德（Jesús Fernández-Villaverde /heɪˈsuːs fɛrˈnɑːndɛθ ˌviːjɑːˈvɛrdeɪ/，宾夕法尼亚大学）、马克·小山（Mark Koyama /mɑːrk kɔɪˈjɑːmə/，乔治·梅森大学）、林友宏（Youhong Lin /juːˈhɒŋ lɪn/，厦门大学）、孙端辉（Tuan-Hwee Sng /twɑːn hweɪ sŋ/，新加坡国立大学）。

en: Published in 2023 in The Quarterly Journal of Economics, Volume 138, Issue 2, pages 1173-1231.
zh: 2023年，发表于《经济学季刊》（The Quarterly Journal of Economics），第138卷第2期，页码1173-1231。

en: The core dependent variable of this paper is the pattern of state formation, specifically the difference between political unification and polycentrism. The authors focus on why China /ˈtʃaɪnə/ historically tended toward unified centralized empires while Europe /ˈjʊərəp/ maintained a multi-state political landscape for extended periods. This dependent variable is measured through the Herfindahl Index, which calculates the sum of squared territorial shares controlled by each polity in a region. A value closer to 1 indicates greater political unification, while a lower value indicates greater political fragmentation (pp. 1200-1201).
zh: 本文的核心因变量是国家形成的政治结构模式，具体而言是政治统一与多中心主义之间的差异。作者关注的是为何中国历史上倾向于形成统一的中央集权帝国，而欧洲则长期维持多国并立的政治格局。这一因变量通过赫芬达尔指数（Herfindahl Index）来测量，该指数计算某一地区内各政体所控制的领土份额的平方和，数值越接近1表示政治越统一，数值越低则表示政治越分裂（第1200-1201页）。

en: The core independent variable is “fractured land,” a concept derived from Jared Diamond’s /ˈdʒærəd ˈdaɪmənd/ 1997 book Guns, Germs, and Steel. The authors distinguish between two dimensions of “fractured land”: in the narrow sense, it refers to topographical ruggedness, including geographical barriers such as mountain ranges and coastline indentation; in the broader sense, it further encompasses the spatial distribution of highly productive agricultural land (p. 1175).

Specifically, the independent variables include the following geographical and climatic characteristics: (1) terrain ruggedness, measured by the standard deviation of elevation; (2) hot and cold climate zones, with the former referring to areas with annual average maximum monthly temperatures above 22°C and the latter referring to areas with annual average minimum monthly temperatures below 8°C; (3) historical resource availability, measured through attainable caloric yields from the FAO Global Agro-Ecological Zones database (GAEZ v4) and the distribution of alluvial soil (pp. 1183-1186).
zh: 本文的核心自变量是“碎裂土地”（Fractured Land），这一概念源自贾雷德·戴蒙德（Jared Diamond /ˈdʒærəd ˈdaɪmənd/）1997年的著作《枪炮、病菌与钢铁》。作者将“碎裂土地”区分为两个层面：狭义上指地形的崎岖程度，包括山脉、海岸线曲折度等地理障碍；广义上则进一步包含高生产力农业用地的空间分布格局（第1175页）。
具体而言，自变量包括以下地理和气候特征：（1）地形崎岖度，以海拔标准差来测量；（2）高温与低温气候区域，前者指年均最高月温度超过22°C的地区，后者指年均最低月温度低于8°C的地区；（3）历史资源可得性，通过联合国粮农组织全球农业生态区数据库（GAEZ v4）的可达热量产出以及冲积土分布来测量（第1183-1186页）。

en: Conceptualization and Measurement

This paper follows the Weberian tradition in defining the concept of “state” or “polity.” The authors explicitly state that a “polity” or “state” is an organization that maintains a quasi-monopoly of violence over a fixed territory (p. 1174, footnote 2). This definition emphasizes that the core characteristic of a state lies in its capacity for violent control over a specific territory, rather than other functional characteristics.

In terms of measurement, the authors divide the global landmass (excluding Antarctica /ænˈtɑːrktɪkə/) into 65,641 hexagonal cells with a radius of 28 kilometers, with each cell representing the minimum territorial unit that the simplest polities could monitor and defend. This radius corresponds to the distance a healthy adult can travel on foot per day, roughly reflecting the control range of the simplest polities during the Bronze Age (pp. 1182-1183). The process of state building is operationalized as the dynamic evolution through which polities gain adjacent cells through conquest or lose cells through secession (pp. 1188-1194).
zh: 本文遵循韦伯式（Weberian）传统来界定“国家”或“政体”的概念。作者明确指出，“政体”或“国家”是指在固定领土范围内保持对暴力的准垄断的组织（第1174页脚注2）。这一定义强调国家的核心特征在于其对特定领土的暴力控制能力，而非其他功能性特征。
在测量方面，作者将全球陆地（不含南极洲）划分为65,641个半径28公里的六边形单元格，每个单元格代表最简单政体能够监控和防御的最小领土单位。这一半径对应于成年人每日步行可覆盖的距离，大致反映了青铜器时代最简单政体的控制范围（第1182-1183页）。国家建构的过程被操作化为政体通过征服获取相邻单元格、或通过分裂丧失单元格的动态演化过程（第1188-1194页）。

en: The core argument of this paper is that “fractured land”—whether referring to topographical barriers or the spatial distribution of highly productive agricultural land—can explain why China /ˈtʃaɪnə/ tended toward political unification while Europe /ˈjʊərəp/ maintained long-term polycentrism. The authors find that topographical factors alone are sufficient but not necessary to explain this divergence; similarly, the concentrated distribution of highly productive land can produce the same effect. Only when both geographical barriers and differences in land productivity are simultaneously neutralized do China and Europe converge in their pace of political unification (pp. 1175, 1202-1203).

Specifically, Europe’s mountain ranges are located at the center of the continent, separating the Italian Peninsula /ɪˈtæliən pəˈnɪnsjʊlə/, the Iberian Peninsula /aɪˈbɪəriən pəˈnɪnsjʊlə/ from France /frɑːns/, and making central European core regions such as Switzerland /ˈswɪtsərlənd/ and Austria /ˈɒɒstriə/ difficult to conquer. This created multiple geographical cores of comparable size that provided the foundation for future European states (pp. 1180-1181). In contrast, China’s most rugged regions are located on the southern and western peripheries and do not intersect with the historically crucial northern Central Plain region. The Central Plain, centered on the Yellow River /ˈjeləʊ ˈrɪvə/ basin, is flat except for the Taishan Mountains /taɪˈʃɑːn ˈmaʊntɪnz/ in Shandong /ˈʃɑːnˈdʊŋ/ and the Dabie Mountains /dɑːˈbjeɪ ˈmaʊntɪnz/ in Anhui /ɑːnˈhweɪ/—geographical conditions that facilitated China’s early unification (p. 1181).
zh: 本文的核心论点是：“碎裂土地”——无论是地形障碍还是高生产力农业用地的空间分布——都能够解释中国为何趋向政治统一而欧洲为何长期保持多中心主义。作者发现，单独的地形因素是解释这一差异的充分条件但非必要条件；同样，高生产力土地的集中分布也能产生相同效果。只有当同时消除地理障碍和土地生产力差异时，中国和欧洲的政治统一进程才会趋于一致（第1175页、第1202-1203页）。

具体而言，欧洲的山脉位于大陆中心位置，将意大利半岛（Italian Peninsula /ɪˈtæliən pəˈnɪnsjʊlə/）、伊比利亚半岛（Iberian Peninsula /aɪˈbɪəriən pəˈnɪnsjʊlə/）与法国（France /frɑːns/）分隔开来，使瑞士（Switzerland /ˈswɪtsərlənd/）和奥地利（Austria /ˈɒstriə/）等中欧核心地区难以被征服，从而形成了多个规模相近的地理核心区，为未来欧洲各国的形成提供了基础（第1180-1181页）。相比之下，中国最崎岖的地区位于南部和西部边缘，不与历史上起关键作用的北方中原地区交叉。中原地区（Central Plain）以黄河（Yellow River /ˈjeləʊ ˈrɪvə/）流域为中心，地势平坦，仅有山东泰山（Taishan Mountains /taɪˈʃɑːn ˈmaʊntɪnz/）和安徽大别山（Dabie Mountains /dɑːˈbjeɪ ˈmaʊntɪnz/）例外，这种地理条件促进了中国的早期统一（第1181页）。

en: This paper proposes multiple mechanisms to explain how the independent variables influence the dependent variable:

First, the geographical barriers and conquest difficulty mechanism. Terrain ruggedness and extreme climatic conditions increase the difficulty of military conquest. In the model, when two evenly matched polities engage in war in a rugged cell, the probability of the war ending with no victor (i.e., no territorial annexation) increases significantly. Following Dupuy’s /djuːˈpiː/ 1979 military history research, the authors set parameters such that in cells at the 90th percentile of ruggedness, the probability of a stalemate is approximately two-thirds (pp. 1196-1197).

Second, the resource concentration and state formation acceleration mechanism. The spatial distribution of highly productive land affects both the probability of conflict and the gains from conquest. In the model, the probability of a cell experiencing border conflict is proportional to its productivity—wealthier regions are more likely to become targets of neighboring covetousness. This assumption is based on Hobbes’s /hɒbz/ thesis that conflict arises from the desire for gain, safety, and reputation (pp. 1188-1189). Northern China possesses a vast core region of high productivity composed of the Yellow River and Yangtze River /ˈjæŋtsi ˈrɪvə/ basins, which are only weakly separated from each other and eventually fused into a single core, providing the resource foundation for early unification (p. 1181).

Third, the “stopping power of water” mechanism. Sea conquest is more difficult than land conquest. Before 1500, ships were not sturdy enough for long-distance power projection across rough seas; naval battles were essentially infantry battles fought on water or beaches, which disadvantaged the aggressor. In the model, the probability of sea conflict is only one-tenth that of land conflict, and the maximum distance for sea conquest is approximately 330 kilometers (pp. 1191-1193).

Fourth, the secession mechanism. Border cells have a certain probability of seceding from their parent polity. The probability of secession depends on three factors: the cell’s geographical and climatic characteristics (which make secession harder to suppress), the number of cells controlled by the parent polity (larger polities are more heterogeneous), and the length of the polity’s frontier relative to its interior (longer frontiers are harder to monitor). This mechanism ensures that large empires face inherent centrifugal forces and must continuously conquer to compensate for territorial losses (pp. 1193-1194).
zh: 本文提出了多重机制来解释自变量如何影响因变量：
第一，地理障碍与征服难度机制。地形崎岖度、极端气候条件都会增加军事征服的难度。在模型中，当两个势均力敌的政体在地形崎岖的单元格发生战争时，战争以无人获胜告终（即无领土兼并）的概率会显著增加。作者根据杜普伊（Dupuy /djuːˈpiː/）1979年的军事史研究设定参数，使得在第90百分位崎岖度的单元格，战争陷入僵局的概率约为三分之二（第1196-1197页）。

第二，资源集中与国家形成加速机制。高生产力土地的空间分布影响冲突发生的概率和征服的收益。在模型中，单元格发生边境冲突的概率与其生产力成正比，即更富庶的地区更可能成为邻国觊觎的目标，这一假设基于霍布斯（Hobbes /hɒbz/）关于冲突根源于对利益、安全和荣誉追求的观点（第1188-1189页）。中国北方存在一个由黄河和长江流域组成的巨大高生产力核心区，这些区域之间仅有较弱的地理分隔并最终融合为单一核心，为早期统一提供了资源基础（第1181页）。
第三，海洋的“阻滞力”机制。海上征服比陆地征服更加困难。在1500年之前，船只不够坚固，无法进行远距离的跨海军事投射；海战本质上是在水上或海滩上进行的步兵战斗，这对进攻方不利。模型中，海上冲突发生的概率仅为陆地冲突的十分之一，且跨海征服的距离上限为约330公里（第1191-1193页）。
第四，分裂机制。边境单元格有一定概率从所属政体分裂出去。分裂概率取决于三个因素：该单元格的地理气候特征（使分裂更难被镇压）、母政体控制的单元格数量（政体越大越异质）、以及母政体边境相对于内部的长度（边境越长监控越困难）。这一机制确保大型帝国面临内在的离心力，需要持续征服来弥补领土损失（第1193-1194页）。

en: Spatial units and geographic coverage: The authors divide the global landmass into 65,641 hexagonal cells with a radius of 28 kilometers. The baseline analysis focuses on 28,822 cells in Eurasia /jʊəˈreɪʒə/, including most of Europe, North Africa /nɔːrθ ˈæfrɪkə/, the Middle East /ˌmɪdl ˈiːst/, continental Asia, and Japan /dʒəˈpæn/. Among these, “China” is defined as 1,415 cells south of the Great Wall, and “(Western) Europe” is defined as 1,285 cells west of the line running from St. Petersburg /seɪnt ˈpiːtəzbɜːrɡ/ to Trieste /triˈɛst/ (pp. 1186-1187).

Time period: The simulation runs from 1000 BCE (the beginning of the Iron Age) to 1500 CE (the eve of the Age of Exploration), spanning 2,500 years with 5-year intervals as time units, totaling 500 simulation periods (pp. 1195-1196).

Main data sources: (1) Terrain ruggedness data comes from the CGIAR-CSI dataset, measured by the standard deviation of elevation within each cell; (2) Climate data comes from WorldClim 1.4 historical data, using annual average monthly maximum and minimum temperatures from the mid-Holocene epoch (4000 BCE); (3) Agricultural productivity data comes from the FAO Global Agro-Ecological Zones database version 4 (GAEZ v4), calculating the highest attainable caloric yields from pre-Columbian cereals for each cell; (4) Soil data comes from the FAO Digital Soil Map of the World, used to identify alluvial soil distribution (pp. 1183-1186).
zh: 空间单元与地理覆盖：作者将全球陆地划分为65,641个半径28公里的六边形单元格。基准分析聚焦于欧亚大陆（Eurasia /jʊəˈreɪʒə/）的28,822个单元格，包括大部分欧洲、北非（North Africa /nɔːrθ ˈæfrɪkə/）、中东（Middle East /ˌmɪdl ˈiːst/）、亚洲大陆和日本（Japan /dʒəˈpæn/）。其中，“中国”定义为长城以南的1,415个单元格，“（西）欧洲”定义为圣彼得堡（St. Petersburg /seɪnt ˈpiːtəzbɜːrɡ/）至的里雅斯特（Trieste /triˈɛst/）连线以西的1,285个单元格（第1186-1187页）。
时间跨度：模拟从公元前1000年（铁器时代开始）运行至公元1500年（大航海时代前夕），共2500年，以5年为一个时间单位，共500个模拟期（第1195-1196页）。

主要数据来源：（1）地形崎岖度数据来自CGIAR-CSI数据集，以每个单元格内海拔的标准差来测量；（2）气候数据来自WorldClim 1.4历史数据，使用全新世中期（公元前4000年）的年均月最高和最低温度；（3）农业生产力数据来自联合国粮农组织全球农业生态区数据库第4版（GAEZ v4），计算各单元格在前哥伦布交换时期本土谷物的最高可达热量产出；（4）土壤数据来自FAO世界数字土壤图，用于识别冲积土分布（第1183-1186页）。

en: This paper employs a dynamic simulation method to test the fractured-land hypothesis. Specifically, the authors construct a dynamic model of polity evolution in which each hexagonal cell begins as an independent polity at the initial period (t=0), then evolves continuously through processes of conquest and secession. The model’s stochasticity derives from probability distributions governing conflict outbreak and war outcomes, embodying the idea that history is a mixture of structure and contingency (p. 1175).

The authors run 30 simulations and conduct bootstrap analysis to calculate the mean Herfindahl indices and their confidence intervals for China and Europe. The specific procedure involves drawing samples with replacement from the 30 simulations 10,000 times to construct 95% confidence intervals for the estimated indices in each period (pp. 1198-1200).

Counterfactual analysis is the core methodological feature of this paper. The authors systematically vary parameter values to identify the relative importance of different factors: (1) “Minimum set of obstacles”—retaining only topographical barriers while eliminating climate effects; (2) “No obstacles”—completely eliminating sea and geo-climatic barriers; (3) “Uniform resource distribution”—assuming equal productivity across all cells; (4) “No obstacles + uniform resource distribution”—simultaneously eliminating both geographical barriers and productivity differences (pp. 1201-1203). This counterfactual design allows the authors to distinguish the explanatory power of topography versus land productivity.

Assumptions required for method validity: First, the model assumes that conflict probability is proportional to cell productivity, based on the Hobbesian logic that wealthier regions are more likely to provoke contention; second, war outcomes are determined by a contest function that depends on the aggregate productivity of warring polities and the geographical characteristics of contested cells; third, the model assumes conflicts between cells are independent, with no alliances or strategic behavior. The authors acknowledge that these simplifying assumptions may omit important mechanisms but emphasize this is a necessary cost of maintaining model tractability (pp. 1189-1191, 1213-1214).
zh: 本文采用动态模拟方法来检验碎裂土地假说。具体而言，作者构建了一个政体演化的动态模型，在该模型中，每个六边形单元格在初始时期（t=0）都是独立政体，随后通过征服和分裂过程不断演化。模型的随机性来自冲突爆发和战争结果的概率分布，体现了历史是结构与偶然性混合产物的思想（第1175页）。
作者运行30次模拟，并通过自助法（bootstrap）分析计算中国和欧洲的平均赫芬达尔指数及其置信区间。具体做法是从30次模拟中有放回地抽取样本10,000次，以此构建每个时期估计指数的95%置信区间（第1198-1200页）。
反事实分析是本文方法论的核心特色。作者通过系统性地改变参数值来识别不同因素的相对重要性：（1）“最小障碍集”——仅保留地形障碍，消除气候因素的影响；（2）“无障碍”——完全消除海洋和地理气候障碍；（3）“均匀资源分布”——假设所有单元格的生产力相同；（4）“无障碍+均匀资源分布”——同时消除地理障碍和生产力差异（第1201-1203页）。这种反事实设计使作者能够区分地形和土地生产力各自的解释力。
方法有效性所需的假设：首先，模型假设冲突发生概率与单元格生产力成正比，这基于更富庶地区更易引发争夺的霍布斯式逻辑；其次，战争胜负由竞赛函数决定，该函数取决于交战政体的总生产力和交战单元格的地理特征；第三，模型假设各单元格的冲突相互独立，不存在联盟或战略行为。作者承认这些简化假设可能遗漏了某些重要机制，但强调这是保持模型可处理性的必要代价（第1189-1191页、第1213-1214页）。

en: The primary contribution of this paper lies in providing a rigorous quantitative formulation of Diamond’s fractured-land hypothesis. Previous discussions of the relationship between geography and state formation were largely qualitative, making it difficult to assess the relative importance of different factors or distinguish between structure and contingency in historical outcomes. By constructing a dynamic model and running simulations, this paper enables, for the first time, a quantitative assessment of the fractured-land hypothesis and generates probability distributions of political structures (p. 1175).

Second, this paper distinguishes between two dimensions of fractured land—topographical barriers and the spatial distribution of highly productive land—and reveals that either can independently explain the difference between Chinese unification and European fragmentation. This finding responds to criticisms of the fractured-land hypothesis by scholars such as Hoffman /ˈhɒfmən/, who pointed out that China is actually more mountainous than Europe. The authors show that what matters is not overall ruggedness but the location of mountain ranges relative to high-productivity core regions (pp. 1180, 1208).

Third, this paper reveals the importance of nonlinear effects. Only when both geographical barriers and differences in land productivity are simultaneously eliminated do China and Europe converge in their pace of political unification; eliminating either factor alone is insufficient to change the basic pattern. This indicates that understanding state formation requires comprehensive consideration of multiple geographical factors and their interactions (pp. 1203, 1208).

Fourth, this paper provides an extensible methodological framework. The authors explicitly note that the vector of geographical and climatic variables in the model can be further enriched to incorporate factors such as religious, linguistic, genetic, and ethnic diversity, or technological and climatic change. This provides a methodological foundation for subsequent research (pp. 1177, 1223-1224).
zh: 本文的首要贡献在于将戴蒙德的碎裂土地假说进行了严格的量化表述。此前关于地理与国家形成关系的讨论多为定性论述，难以评估不同因素的相对重要性，也无法区分结构与偶然性在历史结果中的作用。本文通过构建动态模型和运行模拟，首次能够量化地评估碎裂土地假说，并生成政治结构的概率分布（第1175页）。
其次，本文区分了碎裂土地的两个维度——地形障碍与高生产力土地的空间分布——并揭示了二者可以独立解释中国统一与欧洲分裂的差异。这一发现回应了霍夫曼（Hoffman /ˈhɒfmən/）等学者对碎裂土地假说的批评，后者指出中国实际上比欧洲更加多山。作者表明，关键不在于整体崎岖程度，而在于山脉相对于高生产力核心区的位置（第1180页、第1208页）。
第三，本文揭示了非线性效应的重要性。只有当同时消除地理障碍和土地生产力差异时，中国和欧洲的政治统一进程才会趋同；单独消除任一因素都不足以改变基本模式。这表明，理解国家形成需要综合考虑多种地理因素及其相互作用（第1203页、第1208页）。
第四，本文提供了一个可扩展的方法论框架。作者明确指出，模型中的地理气候变量向量可以进一步丰富，纳入宗教、语言、遗传、民族多样性或技术与气候变迁等因素。这为后续研究提供了方法论基础（第1177页、第1223-1224页）。

en: First, the model lacks strategic interactions. In the model, polities enter conflicts and determine outcomes based on exogenous probability distributions, without strategic considerations such as alliance formation, strategic conquest path selection, or balance of power calculations. The authors acknowledge this is primarily due to computational feasibility constraints but conjecture that strategic interactions would likely strengthen rather than weaken their main findings. Europe’s multi-core structure favors the formation of “balance of power” alliances, while the dominance of China’s northern core region is more likely to lead to “bandwagoning” rather than balancing (pp. 1213-1214). A direction for improvement would be introducing simplified strategic game mechanisms while maintaining computational feasibility.

Second, the model does not incorporate military technological change. Hoffman (2015) emphasized the importance of political-military competition in accelerating military innovation through learning-by-doing, but all parameters in this paper’s model are time-invariant static properties. The authors argue that their results show military technological change is not necessary to explain the China-Europe political structure divergence, but in a richer model, this factor could serve as a complementary mechanism to fractured land (p. 1177).

Third, the model does not consider feedback effects between economic prosperity and political fragmentation. Abramson /ˈæbrəmsən/ (2017) argued that the economic prosperity enjoyed by small independent polities (such as Venice /ˈvɛnɪs/ or the United Provinces of the Netherlands /juːˈnaɪtɪd ˈprɒvɪnsɪz əv ðə ˈnɛðərləndz/) due to European polycentrism allowed them to punch above their weight militarily and survive for centuries. Similarly, once a large polity forms, its urban structure and transportation network further consolidate unification. These feedback mechanisms would likely strengthen the model’s main findings (pp. 1214-1215).

Fourth, the baseline model’s predictions for Africa and the Americas do not match historical records. The model predicts that sub-Saharan Africa /ˌsʌb səˈhærən ˈæfrɪkə/ should have produced several large states, but historically no large sustained agrarian states emerged there before 1500 except Ethiopia /ˌiːθiˈəʊpiə/; the model predicts the largest American empires should have emerged in Argentina /ˌɑːrdʒənˈtiːnə/ and eastern United States, rather than the actual Mesoamerica /ˌmezoʊəˈmɛrɪkə/ and Andes /ˈændiːz/ regions. The authors propose that additional mechanisms such as disease environment, delayed maize diffusion, and guano fertilizer need to be incorporated to bridge theory and data (pp. 1215-1218).
zh: 第一，模型缺乏战略互动。模型中各政体根据外生概率分布进入冲突并决定胜负，不存在联盟形成、战略征服路径选择或权力平衡等战略考量。作者承认，这主要是出于计算可行性的考虑，但也推测战略互动可能会强化而非削弱其主要发现。欧洲的多核心结构有利于“权力平衡”（balance of power）联盟的形成，而中国北方核心区的主导地位则更可能导致“追随强者”（bandwagoning）而非制衡（第1213-1214页）。改进方向是在保持计算可行性的前提下引入简化的战略博弈机制。
第二，模型未纳入军事技术变迁。霍夫曼（2015）强调了政治军事竞争通过“干中学”加速军事创新的重要性，但本文模型中的所有参数都是时间无关的静态属性。作者辩称其结果表明，军事技术变迁对于解释中国-欧洲的政治结构差异并非必要条件，但在更丰富的模型中，这一因素可以作为碎裂土地的补充机制（第1177页）。

第三，模型未考虑经济繁荣与政治分裂之间的反馈效应。阿布拉姆森（Abramson /ˈæbrəmsən/，2017）认为，小型独立政体（如威尼斯（Venice /ˈvɛnɪs/）或荷兰联省共和国（United Provinces of the Netherlands /juːˈnaɪtɪd ˈprɒvɪnsɪz əv ðə ˈnɛðərləndz/））因欧洲多中心主义而享有的经济繁荣使其在军事上能够“以小搏大”并存续数百年。类似地，大型政体一旦形成，其城市结构和交通网络会进一步巩固统一。这些反馈机制可能会强化模型的主要发现（第1214-1215页）。

第四，基准模型对非洲和美洲的预测与历史不符。模型预测撒哈拉以南非洲（sub-Saharan Africa /ˌsʌb səˈhærən ˈæfrɪkə/）应出现数个大型国家，但历史上1500年前该地区除埃塞俄比亚（Ethiopia /ˌiːθiˈəʊpiə/）外没有大型持久农业国家；模型预测美洲最大帝国应出现在阿根廷（Argentina /ˌɑːrdʒənˈtiːnə/）和美国东部，而非实际的中美洲（Mesoamerica /ˌmezoʊəˈmɛrɪkə/）和安第斯山脉（Andes /ˈændiːz/）地区。作者提出需要纳入疾病环境、玉米传播延迟、鸟粪肥料等额外机制来弥合理论与数据（第1215-1218页）。

en: First, incorporating climate change and exogenous shocks. The authors have preliminarily explored in their extended analysis the effects of systemic shocks (such as the Late Bronze Age collapse or the Little Ice Age of the seventeenth century) and regime-specific shocks (such as the An Lushan Rebellion /æn luːˈʃɑːn rɪˈbɛljən/ or the Wars of the Roses) on political cycles. Results show that in the presence of exogenous shocks, political cycles in Europe are muted, while China exhibits a pattern of alternating unification and fragmentation—the “dynastic cycle”—echoing the opening lines of Romance of the Three Kingdoms: “long divided, must unite; long united, must divide” (pp. 1218-1219). Future research could systematically incorporate historical climate data to test the impact of climate shocks on state formation.

Second, exploring the special conditions for the rise of the Roman Empire. The authors find in their extended analysis that neither improving Mediterranean /ˌmɛdɪtəˈreɪniən/ agricultural productivity alone nor granting Rome /rəʊm/ a military advantage alone is sufficient to produce a polity resembling the Roman Empire—only the combination produces larger Mediterranean empires, and such empires typically cannot extend beyond the Alps /ælps/. This suggests the rise of the Roman Empire was highly contingent, also explaining why no similar empire emerged after its collapse (pp. 1219-1220). Future research could further explore the specific mechanisms affecting state formation in the Mediterranean region.

Third, testing path dependence of initial conditions. The authors test the importance of initial conditions through two counterfactual experiments: one uses the world map of 250 CE (when the Roman Empire still dominated Europe while the Han Empire had fragmented into the Three Kingdoms) as the starting point; the other assumes China is fragmented into seven regions while Europe has a large polity the size of the Carolingian Empire /ˌkærəˈlɪndʒɪən ˈɛmpaɪə/. In both cases, China ultimately becomes more unified than Europe, even when the latter starts with an advantage. This indicates geographical factors transcend initial conditions (pp. 1220-1221). Future research could explore under what conditions the influence of initial conditions can persist.

Fourth, applying the model to broader Eurasian comparisons. The authors apply the model to regions such as India /ˈɪndiə/, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia /ˌsaʊθˈiːst ˈeɪʒə/, finding that: the Indian subcontinent is difficult to fully unify due to barriers such as the Himalayas /ˌhɪməˈleɪəz/, Thar Desert /ˈtɑːr ˈdezərt/, and Deccan Plateau /ˈdekən plæˈtəʊ/; the Middle East’s rugged terrain and large deserts impede political consolidation; and Southeast Asia is highly fragmented due to tropical climate and rugged terrain (pp. 1221-1223). Future research could more systematically compare state formation patterns across different regions.

Fifth, integrating cultural and institutional factors. The authors note that after a large state has existed for many periods, its inhabitants may develop an “imagined community,” making conquest more difficult and unification easier to maintain. For example, during the late Roman Republic and the Principate, conquered Italian peoples began thinking of themselves as “Romans” within a few generations. Similarly, Qin Shi Huang’s /tʃɪn ʃiː hwɑːŋ/ standardization of Chinese characters has been a unifying force throughout Chinese history (pp. 1177, 1223-1224). Future research could endogenize cultural assimilation and institutional development into the model.

“The Fractured-Land Hypothesis” is an ambitious work that quantitatively tests geographical determinism. By constructing an elegant dynamic simulation model, the authors successfully transform Diamond’s qualitative hypothesis into testable quantitative propositions and reveal the independent explanatory power of topographical barriers and land productivity distribution, as well as their nonlinear interaction effects. Although the model has limitations such as simplifying assumptions and predictive deviations for non-Eurasian regions, the extensibility of its methodological framework provides ample space for subsequent research. This study makes important theoretical contributions to understanding the geographical roots of state formation in the pre-modern world and the core puzzle of world history—China’s long-term unification versus Europe’s persistent fragmentation.
zh: 第一，纳入气候变迁与外生冲击。作者在扩展分析中已初步探讨了系统性冲击（如青铜器时代晚期的崩溃或十七世纪小冰期）和政权特定冲击（如安史之乱或玫瑰战争）对政治循环的影响。结果显示，在存在外生冲击的情况下，欧洲的政治周期被抑制，而中国则表现出统一与分裂交替的“王朝循环”模式，与《三国演义》开篇所言“合久必分，分久必合”相呼应（第1218-1219页）。未来研究可系统性地纳入历史气候数据来检验气候冲击对国家形成的影响。

第二，探究罗马帝国兴起的特殊条件。作者在扩展分析中发现，单独提高地中海（Mediterranean /ˌmɛdɪtəˈreɪniən/）地区的农业生产力或赋予罗马（Rome /rəʊm/）军事优势都不足以产生类似罗马帝国的政体，只有两者结合才能产生较大的地中海帝国，且该帝国通常不能越过阿尔卑斯山脉（Alps /ælps/）。这表明罗马帝国的兴起高度依赖于偶然因素，也解释了为何其崩溃后再无类似帝国出现（第1219-1220页）。未来研究可进一步探讨影响地中海地区国家形成的特殊机制。

第三，检验初始条件的路径依赖性。作者通过两个反事实实验检验了初始条件的重要性：一是以公元250年的世界地图（当时罗马帝国仍主导欧洲而汉帝国已分裂为三国）为起点；二是假设中国分裂为七个区域而欧洲存在加洛林帝国规模的大型政体。两种情况下，中国最终都会比欧洲更加统一，即使后者初始更有优势。这表明地理因素的影响超越了初始条件（第1220-1221页）。未来研究可探讨在何种条件下初始条件的影响能够持续存在。

第四，将模型应用于更广泛的欧亚比较。作者将模型应用于印度（India /ˈɪndiə/）、中东和东南亚（Southeast Asia /ˌsaʊθˈiːst ˈeɪʒə/）等地区，发现：印度次大陆因喜马拉雅山脉（Himalayas /ˌhɪməˈleɪəz/）、塔尔沙漠（Thar Desert /ˈtɑːr ˈdezərt/）、德干高原（Deccan Plateau /ˈdekən plæˈtəʊ/）等障碍而难以完全统一；中东因崎岖地形和大片沙漠而难以完成政治整合；东南亚因热带气候和崎岖地形而高度分裂（第1221-1223页）。未来研究可更系统地比较不同地区的国家形成模式。
第五，整合文化与制度因素。作者指出，大型国家存续一段时间后，其居民可能发展出“想象的共同体”，使征服更加困难、统一更易维持。例如，罗马共和国晚期和元首制时期，被征服的意大利各民族在几代人之内就开始自认为“罗马人”。类似地，秦始皇统一文字成为贯穿中国历史的统一力量（第1177页、第1223-1224页）。未来研究可将文化同化和制度发展内生化纳入模型。

《碎裂土地假说》是一项将地理决定论量化检验的雄心之作。通过构建精巧的动态模拟模型，作者成功地将戴蒙德的定性假说转化为可检验的量化命题，并揭示了地形障碍与土地生产力分布各自独立的解释力以及二者的非线性交互效应。虽然模型存在简化假设和对非欧亚地区预测偏差等局限，但其方法论框架的可扩展性为后续研究提供了广阔空间。该研究对于理解前现代世界国家形成的地理根源，以及中国长期统一与欧洲持续分裂这一世界历史核心谜题，具有重要的理论贡献。
《国家的卡特尔体系：国际政治的经济学理论》 “The Cartel System of States: An Economic Theory of International Politics”
阿维迪特·阿查里亚（Avidit Acharya /ˌɑːvɪˈdiːt əˈtʃɑːrjə/）与亚历山大·李（Alexander Lee /ˌælɪɡˈzændər liː/）
2023年，牛津大学出版社（Oxford University Press）

en: The core dependent variable of this book is the emergence, stability, and persistence of the modern territorial state system. Specifically, the authors are concerned with why international borders carry such profound political significance in modern times, why residents on opposite sides of a border are subject to vastly different governance systems, and why states have achieved such extensive cooperation and tacit agreement in dividing governance rights. Using the example of the towns of Neche /ˈniːʃi/, North Dakota, and Gretna /ˈɡretnə/, Manitoba, on the US-Canada border, the authors point out that despite these two communities being neighbors and highly similar, the border corresponds to a sharp change in political authority—one side subject to Canadian laws, Canadian taxes, and Canadian public services, the other to American laws, American taxes, and American services (p. 1). This political salience of borders is a fundamental fact of modern political life and the core phenomenon this book seeks to explain.

The authors further point out that the defining feature of the modern territorial state system is the local, bounded, monopoly that states have in governing their citizens. States refuse to violate each other’s monopolies even when they could do so easily, and even attempts to seize territory by force have become rarer over time (pp. 4-5). This stable pattern of cooperation—rather than conflict—is the focus of the book.

In Chapters 1-2, the dependent variable was the existence and stability of the cartel system of states characterized by territorial sovereignty and mutual recognition. Chapter 3 extends this by specifying the historical emergence of this system as the dependent variable. The chapter focuses on three observable manifestations of the cartel system’s emergence: the decline of universal claims to authority, the rise of clearly demarcated interstate borders, and the development of modern diplomacy with permanent embassies and formal equality among states (pp.55-58). The transformation is from a medieval system of overlapping jurisdictions, hierarchical relationships, and ambiguous territorial claims to a modern system where rulers claim absolute practical control over finite, bounded territories rather than theoretical control over infinite domains (p.55).
zh: 本书的核心因变量是现代领土国家体系的形成、稳定与持续存在。具体而言，作者关注的是：为何国际边界在现代具有如此深刻的政治意义？为何边界两侧的居民被纳入截然不同的治理体系？为何国家之间能够在划分治理权方面达成如此广泛的合作与默契？作者以美国（United States /juːˈnaɪtɪd steɪts/）与加拿大（Canada /ˈkænədə/）边境的尼奇镇（Neche /ˈniːʃi/）与格雷特纳镇（Gretna /ˈɡretnə/）为例，指出尽管这两个社区相邻且高度相似，但边界却对应着政治权威的急剧变化——一边是加拿大法律、加拿大税收、加拿大公共服务，另一边则是美国法律、美国税收与美国公共服务（第1页）。这种边界的政治显著性是现代政治生活的基本事实，也是本书试图解释的核心现象。
作者进一步指出，现代国家体系的核心特征是国家对其公民享有地方性、有边界的、垄断性的治理权。国家相互拒绝侵犯彼此的垄断权，即使有能力也不轻易这样做。甚至武力夺取领土的企图也随着时间推移变得越来越罕见（第4-5页）。这种稳定的合作格局——而非冲突——才是本书关注的焦点。

在第一、二章中，因变量是以领土主权和相互承认为特征的国家卡特尔体系的存在与稳定性。第三章将此拓展为该体系的历史性生成过程。本章聚焦于卡特尔体系生成的三个可观察表现：普世性权威主张的衰落、清晰界定的国家间边界的兴起，以及以常驻大使和国家间形式平等为特征的现代外交制度的发展（第55-58页）。这一转型是从中世纪管辖权重叠、等级关系分明、领土主张模糊的体系，转变为现代体系——在现代体系中，统治者主张对有限、有界领土的绝对实际控制，而非对无限疆域的理论控制（第55页）。

en: The core independent variable of this book is the incentive for rulers to avoid competition and maximize profits in the governance market. The authors conceptualize “governance” as an evolving package of services that states provide to their citizens, including protection, dispute resolution, education, healthcare, and infrastructure (p. 5, pp. 22-23). Because these services have value and there is demand for them, there exists a “market for governance.” In this market, states are the suppliers of governance, citizens are the demanders, and taxes are the “price” citizens pay for governance services.

The authors emphasize that the governance market has the potential to be competitive: if residents near borders or powerful local elites consider taxes too high relative to benefits received, they may choose to join another polity, or threaten to do so to extract concessions (pp. 5-6). In a competitive governance market, citizens would receive more services and lower taxes, while rulers’ profits would be compressed. Therefore, rulers have strong incentives to collude, divide the market, and eliminate competition, so that they can enjoy monopoly pricing power within their respective territories and collect higher tax revenues (p. 5, pp. 28-29).

The conceptualization of “state” in this book builds on the political economy tradition, especially the “monopoly of protection” theory of Frederick Lane /ˈfredərɪk leɪn/ and Charles Tilly /tʃɑːrlz ˈtɪli/. Lane and Tilly argued that early states in medieval Europe did little beyond providing basic protection, essentially functioning as “protection rackets,” where rulers supplied protection to citizens against the threat of violence from themselves (p. 22).
